title: Ifak First Aid Kit
description: The IFAK First Aid Kit is based off the IFAK First Aid Kit from Escape From Tarkov.
body:
This tactical IFAK medkit provides quick emergency healing—hold right-click while injured to begin applying it; after the short use it restores 2.5 hearts (5 HP) and consumes one of the kit’s three uses. When item is consumed a soft wrapping sounds play, and on completion you also gain a brief Speed I boost (3 seconds); the tooltip notes the speed buff.
